description: We’re charged, on behalf of government, with the mission to clean-up the UK’s former nuclear sites safely, securely and cost effectively. NDA is an executive non-departmental public body, sponsored by the Department for Energy Security and Net Zero , supported by 3 agencies and public bodies .

details.body:
We’re charged, on behalf of government, with the mission to clean-up the UK’s former nuclear sites safely, securely and cost effectively.

NDA is an executive non-departmental public body, sponsored by the Department for Energy Security and Net Zero, supported by 3 agencies and public bodies.

ordered_featured_documents.summary: Nuclear Decommissioning Authority group Chair to step down to focus on other existing and potential future board roles.
ordered_featured_documents.title: Change of Nuclear Decommissioning Authority Chair

ordered_featured_documents.summary: Hunterston B nuclear power station in North Ayrshire has transferred ownership from EDF to the Nuclear Decommissioning Authority.
ordered_featured_documents.title: Hunterston B nuclear power station has transferred to the NDA

ordered_featured_documents.summary: A new office hub in Millom has started to take shape.
ordered_featured_documents.title: New working hub planned for Millom library building

ordered_featured_documents.summary: Almost £2 million was invested by NRS last year in socio-economic initiatives, supporting good causes in communities local to its 14 decommissioning sites.
ordered_featured_documents.title: NRS socio-economic funding supports 129 UK community projects

ordered_featured_documents.summary: The Nuclear Decommissioning Authority (NDA) is launching a UK‑wide training programme to support project professionals across the nuclear sector.
ordered_featured_documents.title: Nuclear project academy goes national

ordered_featured_documents.summary: NDA publishes latest strategy setting out long term roadmap for the safe and secure decommissioning of the UK’s legacy nuclear sites.
ordered_featured_documents.title: NDA publishes latest nuclear decommissioning strategy

details.secondary_corporate_information_pages: Read about the types of information we routinely publish in our Publication scheme. Our Personal information charter explains how we treat your personal information.

details.body:
Senior Non-Executive Directors are members of the Nuclear Decommissioning Authority’s Board.

The Senior Non-Executive Director acts as a sounding board for the Chair on board dynamics, performance, and sensitive issues, leads the annual appraisal of the Chair and serves as a point of contact for other non-executive or executive directors who have concerns they are unable or reluctant to raise with the Chair.

The Board:

  • monitors the NDA’s performance and directs its business effectively, including playing an active role in stakeholder relations
  • receives frequent updates on the NDA’s financial position, forecasts and sensitivities
  • ensures that a balanced assessment of performance is reported to the Department for Energy Security and Net Zero and regularly debates the main (corporate strategic) risks facing the NDA

role_appointments.title: Catriona Schmolke CBE FREng - Senior Non-Executive Director

details.body:
The Group Chief Finance Officer at the NDA is an Executive Board member with the Group CEO, and is responsible for leadership and development of the group-wide finance function, financial stakeholder management with Government and externally, strategic funding and revenue, treasury and financial planning, financial reporting and performance management, financial controls and delegations, and management of financial risks.

The Group CFO is also responsible for group-wide insurance, land and property.
